title: 1 step DFU - User can trigger firmware update for just Charge Case
scenario: User can trigger a firmware update for just the Voyager Free 60+ Charge Case without updating the Earbuds via Settings/Update
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure the Voyager Free 60 Earbuds and Charge Case are both powered on and connected to the app.
3. Verify both devices are running at least firmware version 5039.
4. Confirm that a firmware update is available for both the Earbuds and the Charge Case.
5. From the Home screen, navigate to Settings → Update.
6. Tap the Update button to view available firmware updates.
7. Locate the Charge Case update entry and tap its Update button (do not select the Earbuds update).
8. Wait for the Charge Case firmware update process to complete.
expected: Only the Charge Case DFU completes successfully. The Earbuds remain on the lower firmware version (5039 or earlier) and are not updated.
